name: How long does Siri optimization usually take?
description: Basic Siri setup takes a few minutes, while a full tune-up with permissions and Shortcuts can take 10–20 minutes.

mainEntity.name: How long does Siri optimization usually take?

acceptedAnswer.text: A basic Siri setup usually takes only a few minutes. If you are also adding Shortcuts, retraining voice recognition, and adjusting app permissions, expect closer to 10–20 minutes for a solid setup.
acceptedAnswer.description: Basic Siri setup takes a few minutes, while a full tune-up with permissions and Shortcuts can take 10–20 minutes.
